creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Bartek Rutkowski from comment #4)
> By the way, is there a reason for changing the WWW url but MASTERSITE
> staying the same? Are you forking the project, or have the original upsteram
> passed it over to you?

Reasonable question. :)
(passed) but I didn't see a good reason to change
MASTER_SITES until I add my additions/changes,
which will also necessitate a version bump.

Thanks, Bartek Rutkowski.

--Chris
